About Us

KL's Trusted Waste & Equipment Partner

Cemerlang Endas Sdn. Bhd. is a SSM-registered, full-service waste management and equipment rental company headquartered in Kepong, Kuala Lumpur. Decades of field experience with a commitment to clean, compliant, and reliable service.

🏢

SSM Registered & Fully Compliant

All operations adhere to local waste management regulations and environmental guidelines.

🚛

Full In-House Fleet

From lorries to cranes, our maintained fleet means faster response and reliable delivery every time.

📞

One Call, Full Coverage

Waste removal, equipment hire, bin supply, sand, and landscaping — all from one team.

Our Services

Comprehensive Waste & Equipment Solutions

From daily commercial collection to heavy crane lifts — handled end-to-end by our experienced team.

Core Service

Commercial & Industrial Waste Removal

Scheduled and on-demand collection for factories, commercial complexes, construction sites, and institutions across KL.

Most Popular
Residential

Residential Garbage Collection

Regular doorstep collection for housing estates, condominiums, and residential communities — reliable and consistent.

Residential
Equipment

Waste Compactors & Bin Supply

Supply and maintenance of waste compactors, 240L/120L wheeled bins, and skips. We deliver, service, and collect.

Equipment
Heavy Equipment

Mobile Crane & Sky-Lift Rental

Heavy-duty mobile cranes and mast-climbing sky-lifts for construction, maintenance, and industrial lifting operations.

Heavy Equipment
Transport

Lorry Rental & Sand Supply

Flatbed and tipper lorry hire for logistics, construction materials, and bulk sand delivery across the Klang Valley.

Transport
Landscaping

Tree & Grass Cutting

Professional landscaping support — tree trimming, grass cutting, and green waste disposal for residential and commercial estates.

Landscaping

Equipment & Machinery

Well-maintained and operator-certified — deployed fully by our experienced in-house team.

Why Choose Us

The Cemerlang Endas Advantage

Decades of experience, a full fleet, and a genuine commitment to KL's cleaner future.

🤝

Trusted Local Partner

KL-based and community-rooted. We know local regulations, logistics, and client expectations inside out.

🚛

Full In-House Fleet

From sky-lifts to skip bins — our maintained fleet handles everything with speed and reliability.

📋

Compliant & Certified

All operations follow local waste management regulations. Operators are trained and documentation is clean.

💡

One-Stop Solutions

Waste removal, equipment rental, bin supply, sand, and landscaping — from a single reliable call.

Service Area

Covering KL & Klang Valley
